description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/prd.md to add an Acceptance Criteria subsection to the 'receipt emailed' story, which had none. The other two stories already have Acceptance Criteria. check_prd.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_prd.py: 1 story missing acceptance criteria — 'As a customer, I want a receipt emailed to me'. Adding an Acceptance Criteria subsection with testable bullets matching the story's own description (email sent after successful purchase, receipt has proof-of-purchase details). Not touching the checker.

actions.content:
# PRD: Course Checkout Flow

## Story: As a visitor, I want to buy the course with a credit card

A visitor lands on the course page, clicks "Buy now", and completes checkout
via Paddle without leaving a hosted checkout overlay.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Clicking "Buy now" opens the Paddle checkout overlay within 1 second.
- [ ] A successful payment redirects to the course access page.
- [ ] A failed payment shows an inline error and does not close the overlay.

## Story: As a customer, I want a receipt emailed to me

After a successful purchase, the customer should get an email receipt so
they have proof of purchase for expensing or taxes.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A receipt email is sent within 5 minutes of a successful payment.
- [ ] The receipt includes the buyer's email, amount charged, and purchase
      date/time.
- [ ] If the email fails to send, the purchase still completes and a retry
      is queued.

## Story: As an admin, I want to see all completed purchases in a dashboard

The admin dashboard lists every completed purchase with buyer email, amount,
and timestamp, sortable by date.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The dashboard lists every completed purchase with email, amount, and
      timestamp.
- [ ] The list is sortable by timestamp, newest first by default.

interactions.notes: The fix — check_prd.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
